items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 1 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「Deploy a Production-Ready NVIDIA AI-Q Blueprint on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
actionItems: 评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：Deploy a Production-Ready NVIDIA AI-Q Blueprint on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure
watchItems: 跟进：Deploy a Production-Ready NVIDIA AI-Q Blueprint on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure

items.title: Deploy a Production-Ready NVIDIA AI-Q Blueprint on Oracle Cloud Infrastructure
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「Agent Skill、Harness、工具调用和自动化研发」。原文摘要显示：AI agents have changed a lot in the last two years. The first could only answer one question at a time. Then came multi-turn chat, where the model could keep...
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。
